title: Doctor appointment
explanation:
Doctor appointment

Listen to a patient talking to a doctor.

Transcript

Doctor: How long have you had the pain?
Patient: For about ten days. It started after I helped a friend move house.
Doctor: Does it hurt all the time?
Patient: Mostly in the morning. It gets better when I walk around.
Doctor: I think you have strained a muscle. I will prescribe painkillers and some rest.

questions.text: The patient has had the pain for [*about ten days|ten weeks|two days].
questions.feedback: The patient says about ten days.

questions.text: The pain started after [*helping a friend move|playing football|driving to work].
The doctor thinks it is [*a strained muscle|a broken bone|the flu].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The pain gets better when the patient ____.  | *walks around | sits down | goes to sleep
The doctor will prescribe ____.  | *painkillers | antibiotics | exercise equipment
The pain started after helping a friend move ____.  | *house | office | furniture shop
The doctor also recommends some ____.  | *rest | travel | surgery
The patient probably has [*a minor injury|a serious infection|food poisoning].
questions.feedback: A strained muscle is a minor injury.

questions.text: The doctor asks about the [*duration|cost|address] of the pain first.
questions.feedback: How long have you had the pain?

questions.text: The patient says the pain is [*not constant|constant|gone].
questions.feedback: Mostly in the morning, so not constant.
